prestazioni: Upgrade the twin-turbocharged 6.3L V8 (engine code: SSC *6300*) with a custom billet aluminum crankshaft from Bryant Racing, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods to handle 1,200+ HP reliably. Pair with a custom dry-sump oiling system from Dailey Engineering to prevent oil starvation under extreme lateral G-forces.

Replace the stock turbos with a pair of Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (88mm inducer, 1.35 A/R turbine housing) on custom Inconel manifolds by Burns Stainless, paired with a TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegate and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valve. Use a custom intercooler core from PWR (1,200 HP-rated) with 4.5" charge pipes and silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance.

Install a Motec M150 ECU with a custom flex-fuel ethanol (E85) calibration by AEM Performance Electronics, paired with a dual Bosch 044 fuel pump setup and ID1700x injectors. Add a custom nitrous oxide system from Nitrous Express (150-shot direct-port) with progressive controller for on-demand power spikes during top-speed runs.
estetica: Replace the stock carbon fiber body panels with a full dry carbon fiber widebody kit from Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Aero Ultimate Aero spec), including extended front fenders, aggressive side skirts, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated exhaust exits for the dual 4.5" titanium exhaust from Akrapović.

Install a custom front splitter from Rocket Bunny (Pandem Aero) with adjustable canards and a rear wing from Vorsteiner (GT3-spec, 3D carbon fiber with active Gurney flap). Add a custom clear bra from XPEL Stealth for full-body paint protection, including the windshield and side windows.

Upgrade the interior with a full Alcantara-wrapped roll cage by The Rig (FIA-spec, bolt-in) and custom Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, 6-point harnesses by Schroth). Replace the stock steering wheel with a custom MOMO Prototipo (flat-bottom, Alcantara grip) and add a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada with custom SSC-themed graphics.
